ValidationRule.description: מוודא כי מספר הטלפון יכיל 9 או 10 תווים, ויתחיל ב-0 במידה והמטופל ישראלי.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (ISNEW() || ISCHANGED(Clinic_Phone__c )) && NOT(ISBLANK(Clinic_Phone__c )) && ( NOT(LEN(Clinic_Phone__c ) = 9 || LEN(Clinic_Phone__c ) = 10) || (LEN(Clinic_Phone__c ) = 9 && ( NOT(LEFT(Clinic_Phone__c , 2) = "02" || LEFT(Clinic_Phone__c , 2) = "03" || LEFT(Clinic_Phone__c , 2) = "04" || LEFT(Clinic_Phone__c , 2) = "08" || LEFT(Clinic_Phone__c , 2) = "09" )) || (LEN(Clinic_Phone__c ) = 10 &&(NOT(LEFT(Clinic_Phone__c , 2) = "05" || LEFT(Clinic_Phone__c , 2) = "07"))) ))
